admission_process: CMC Vellore runs two nursing campuses with different admission processes. The Vellore campus uses CMC’s own two-step entrance exam. The Chittoor campus uses NEET UG merit. Allied health science programmes including BPT and BOT now admit based on NEET UG following a national commission directive in early 2026.
exams_accepted: All three institutions admit through NEET UG. The counselling authority, seat distribution, service commitment, and fee structure differ significantly. The comparison below covers the most decision-relevant differences for MBBS aspirants.
eligibility_criteria: CMC Vellore PG medical admission 2026 covers MD, MS, DM, M.Ch, MHA, and MPH programmes. MD and MS admissions follow NEET PG merit, with MCC counselling for All India Quota seats. DM and MCh admission follows NEET SS, with MCC handling 100% of seats at CMC Vellore as a deemed university.

admission_process: The institute offers admission to the M.Ch course under a specialization. MAMC Admission offers only 4 seats for the M.Ch course. Detailed information about the course is mentioned below:

PGIMER Chandigarh BSc Nursing admission 2026 is based on an institute-level entrance exam conducted by PGIMER itself. There are 93 seats in the 4-year BSc Nursing programme and 62 seats in the 2-year Post-Basic BSc Nursing programme, for a combined intake of 155 seats.
exams_accepted: PGIMER Chandigarh also offers paramedical, PhD, and Fellowship programmes through separate institute-level entrance exams. Applications and notifications are published at pgimer.edu.in.
eligibility_criteria: PGIMER Chandigarh DM and M.Ch admission is conducted through INI SS (Institute of National Importance Super Speciality), a two-stage selection process. PGIMER, being an INI, all DM and M.Ch seats are filled through INI SS counselling by AIIMS Delhi, not through MCC.

admission_process: Candidates who are a member of a family business and have completed their bachelor’s degree are eligible to apply for the PGP MFAB program. Though the work experience is not mandatory, the students are expected to have 2-3 years of work experience. ISB Hyderabad PGP MFAB admission includes the following stages:
ISB Mohali offers admission to the FPM and Executive FPM program.

Hansraj College admission is through CUET (UG/PG/PhD) along with the CSAS counselling procedure. All candidates seeking admission to DU colleges, including Hansraj College, must meet the minimum CUET cut-offs, the qualifying exam requirements, and follow the Delhi University allocation rules.
important_dates: Hansraj College offers UG and PG admissions on the basis of CUET. The tables below show important dates regarding admissions at Hansraj College.

admission_process: Hindu College Admission 2026 will be conducted through CUET and DU’s CSAS counselling, offering entry into one of DU’s top-ranked colleges known for its strong academics and vibrant campus life, and excellent placements. LSR Delhi offers admission in the PG Program based on Graduation Score and the CUET PG exams. Candidates must apply to the CSAS Counselling.
important_dates: LSR Delhi offers UG and PG admissions on the basis of CUET. The tables below show important dates regarding admissions at LSR Delhi.

admission_process: NALSAR University of Law follows a well-defined admission process for its law and management programmes. Admissions are conducted through entrance examinations, followed by counselling or selection rounds as per the programme, with official schedules released for registration, tests, results, and seat confirmation.
exams_accepted: Admission at NALSAR University of Law is based on national-level entrance exams, followed by merit-based shortlisting and additional evaluation rounds as applicable. Final selection is confirmed through seat allotment, document verification, and fee payment.

admission_process: AIIMS New Delhi PhD admission 2026 runs in two sessions: January and July. The institute accepts both medical and non-medical postgraduates across 30 plus departments. All PhD admissions go through a Computer-Based Test conducted by AIIMS.
exams_accepted: The table below compares AIIMS New Delhi with JIPMER Puducherry and MAMC New Delhi for MBBS admission. These are the most frequently compared institutes by NEET toppers.

admission_process: IIT Delhi offers multiple PG programs, namely MS Research, M.Sc., M.Des, MA, MBA, MPP, and PG Diploma courses. exams_accepted: JEE Advanced, JEE Main, GATE, CAT, IIT JAM, CEED, UCEED, UGC NET
eligibility_criteria: The IIT Delhi PhD. admissions are based on personal interviews conducted by the concerned department/center. The applications for IIT Delhi PhD. admission 2024-2025 were available in March 2024 at https://owncloud.iitd.ac.in/nextcloud/index.php/s/YQW7tbrr8MwbxG7.

National Law School of India University (NLSIU), Bangalore admits students through CLAT, CLAT-PG, or NLSAT, depending on the programme. Admissions are merit-based, subject to eligibility, reservations, and seat availability, and finalized through the prescribed counselling process.
exams_accepted: Since NLSIU Bangalore is currently the top NLU in India, with an NIRF rank of #1, you will have to put in a lot of work. There will be 120 questions in the exam overall. The questions will be based on the updated CLAT Exam Pattern. Here's how you can prepare for CLAT to get into NLSIU Bangalore:
important_dates: Yes, NLSIU accepts a valid score in CLAT PG for admission to its one-year LLM degree program. For admission into the postgraduate LLM programme, the candidate must take the Common Law Admission Test (CLAT-PG), and achieve the required cutoff for the respective academic year.

admission_process: IITB offers admission to PhD courses under 4 categories, namely Institute Assistantship, Individual Fellowship (ie, CSIR / UGC /DBT / ICMR / INSPIRE etc.), Sponsored, and Working Professionals. PhD courses are offered in Engineering, Sciences, Management, Design, and Humanities & Social Sciences.
exams_accepted: JEE Advanced, JEE Main, GATE, CAT, IIT JAM, CEED, UCEED, UGC NET

admission_process: IIT Madras offers UG and PG programs including BS, MA, and M.Sc across various disciplines. Admission is based on JEE Advanced or IISER Aptitude Test for BS, GATE for MA, and IIT JAM for M.Sc, subject to prescribed eligibility criteria.
exams_accepted: To be admitted to the IIT Madras PhD course, you need to meet the eligibility criteria and also apply for the course following the application process. To be able to meet the eligibility criteria for admission to PhD in IIT Madras you need a master's degree in the relevant subject with at least 60% marks or a total CGPA of 6 out of 10. You will be eligible if you have a bachelor’s degree from IIT with a CGPD of 8 or above. You must also sit for the national-level entrance exams such as NET, GATE
important_dates: You can find the IIT Madras application form 2024 for data science course on the official website of IIT Madras (https://study.iitm.ac.in/ds/admissions.html#AD4). As per the updated information, the registrations for IIT Madras data science course will begin on June 17 for the September 2024 batch.

admission_process: The admission process followed by IIT Kanpur is similar to the admission process followed by all the other IITs. The main thing that you need to keep in mind is that in India to take admission in most of the colleges, appearing for GATE Examination is mandatory. Similarly, for IIT Kanpur as well to take admission to MTech, you will have to appear for the GATE examination and secure a high rank to be eligible for counseling. You will need to qualify the GATE examination and register at COAP for admission in the course. Try to secure a high rank as the competition is very high and seats for MTech in the IITs is limited. So, only the top-ranking students get the chance to study at IIT Kanpur every year. If you want to be one of them, then study hard.
exams_accepted: JEE Advanced, JEE Main, GATE, CAT, IIT JAM, CEED
eligibility_criteria: IIT Kanpur offers 14 distinct e-Masters programs through various departments to its students. Candidates for this program must have a Bachelor's or Master's degree in the relevant discipline with at least 55% marks (5.5/10 CPI) and at least 2 years of work experience. The different e-Masters programs that the institution offers are listed below:

admission_process: IIT Roorkee offers Ph.D programs in Science, Engineering & Technology, Management Studies, and Architecture & Planning. Admission to the Ph.D program is based on the National level entrance exam, i.e. GATE/CEED/JEST/UGC-NET/CSIR-NET.
exams_accepted: JEE Advanced, JEE Main, GATE, CAT, IIT JAM, CEED, UCEED
eligibility_criteria: The selection for the IIT Roorkee Phd program is done on the basis of individual merit and/or an interview conducted by the respective department.

admission_process: IIM Calcutta is one of the preferred choices for recruiters from the Finance Domain. The institute offers admission to its regular MBA, Executive MBA, and Ph.D courses based on scores in national-level entrance exams, followed by further steps of the admission process. Admission to the regular MBA course (a 2-year Program) is based on scores in the CAT/GMAT entrance exam. The more details about the admission to popular courses at IIM Calcutta are tabulated below-

admission_process: WB National University of Juridical Sciences (WBNUJS), Kolkata admits students through CLAT and CLAT-PG, depending on the programme. Admissions are merit-based, subject to eligibility, reservations, and seat availability, and finalized through the prescribed counselling process.
important_dates: The CLAT 2026 counselling process is conducted in multiple rounds by the Consortium of NLUs. WBNUJS accepts CLAT scores for admission to its UG and PG law programmes, and candidates allotted seats must pay the confirmation fee within the specified timelines to opt for Freeze or Float options and secure admission.

admission_process: IHM Mumbai offers a 1.5-year Diploma program in 6 specialisations, such as Food Production, Bakery & Confectionery, Food & Beverage Service, Front Office Operations, Housekeeping Executive, and Bartending. Candidates who have completed 10+2 (HSC) with English as a core subject are eligible to apply. Admission is based on merit in the qualifying examination, followed by a personal interview.

Miranda House offers admission to various UG and PG courses based on the CUET score. The candidate seeking admission to Miranda House must register for the DU CSAS. The application process starts from December for the CUET PG, while the CUET UG begins from March
important_dates: Miranda House offers UG and PG admissions on the basis of CUET. The tables below show important dates regarding admissions at Miranda House.

admission_process: VMMC offers 181 PG seats across MD, MS, and Diploma programmes. It also offers 22 super-specialty seats across DM and M.Ch courses. PG admission is through NEET PG scores and MCC PG counselling.
eligibility_criteria: VMMC offers 50 seats for B.Sc (Hons) Nursing, a 4-year full-time programme. Admission is based on NEET UG scores. GGSIPU conducts the nursing counselling at ipu.admissions.nic.in.

admission_process: Not Specified
exams_accepted: IHM Bangalore offers an M.Sc. in Hospitality Administration as part of its postgraduate program.

admission_process: IHM Pusa offers admission based on NCHMCT-JEE entrance exam scores conducted by NTA. It is a computer-based examination. The eligibility criteria for IHM Pusa admission are that the candidate must have completed their 10+2 with a minimum of 50%, with English as a compulsory subject.
exams_accepted: No, NCHMCT JEE is not required for IHM Pusa diploma programmes. Instead of using the NCHMCT JEE entrance exam, IHM Pusa offers merit-based diploma admissions, which are based on your performance in the qualifying exam, typically 10+2 or its equivalent with English as a subject. The NCHMCT JEE is only required for a few postgraduate programmes and the B.Sc. in Hospitality & Hotel Administration. For diploma programmes (such as Food Production, Bakery & Confectionery, and Food & Beverage Service),
eligibility_criteria: IHM Pusa offers a Diploma course in 3 specialisations, such as Food Production, Bakery & confectionery, and Food & Beverage Service. An eligible candidate needs to complete 10+2 from a recognised board with English as a compulsory subject. Selection is merit-based from a qualifying examination.

admission_process: WGSHA Manipal Admission 2024 will be based on the merit in Department Test, Group Discussion, Panel Interview and Personal Interview. WGSHA offers BA in Culinary Arts & BHM at UG Level. At PG Level, it offers M.Sc, MHM and MA. Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration is a constituent unit of Manipal Academy of Higher Education and has been accredited with WACS & IFCA.
SLS Pune offers admission to the PhD program. For admission to the PhD program, candidates must have a master’s degree with 55% marks from a recognised university.
